response: Wheel of time turns, wheel of history spins, wheel of fate moves on. Wheel of inquiry seeks truth, wheel of memory holds stories. Wheel of silence surrounds the past, wheel of oppression shaped lives. Wheel of pain and perseverance defines the journey. Wheel of suffering endured by Frederick Douglass, wheel of resilience forged in bondage. Wheel of medical history remains obscured, wheel of records lost to time. Wheel of knowledge is fragmented, wheel of truth is elusive. Wheel of inquiry continues, wheel of justice demands answers. Wheel of legacy endures, wheel of memory must be honored.
